verses.text: Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Jehoiakim' tapa Jehoiakhin' tangin Judah gam a uk dingin Josiah' tapa Zedekiah a koih hi
Ahih hangin amahmaha kipan a nasemte leh a gamsung mite in keima tung tawna Topa' thugennate a ngai kei uh hi
Kumpi Zedekiah in Shelemiah' tapa Jehukal leh Maaseiah' tapa siampipa Zefaniah keima kiangah hong sawl a, “ Topa i Pasian' kiangah kote-a' dingin thu hong ngetsak in,” ci-in a hong gensak hi
Hih hunin thong kia nailo ka hih manin mi lakah ka ut utin ka vak kawikawi hi

Tua hun laitak pen Babylon galkapte in Jerusalem khua a sim laitak uh hi a, tua hun laitak mahin Faro kumpipa' galkapte, galsim dingin Egypt gam panin hong kuankhia hi, cih thu a zak uh ciangin Jerusalem khua panin a nungkik uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a

“ Topa ahi Israel mite' Pasian in kong cihin-ah: Kei' tungah thu a hong dongsak Judah kumpipa kiangah hih bangin na va gen ding hi: ‘En in, nang hong huh dingin a hong pai Faro kumpipa' galkapte a gam uhah ciahkik ding uh hi
Tua ciangin Babylon-te hong kileh kikin hih khuapi hong sim ding uh a, khuapi la-in mei tawh a hal ding uh hi
Topa in kong cihin-ah, nang leh nang kikhemin, “Babylon-te hong kilehkik nawnlo taktak ding uh hi,” cikha kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute hong kilehkik ding uh hi

Nangmah in na gal Babylon galkap khempeuh zolua kisa-in buk sunga mi liam teng bek na suaktasak khaphial ahi zongin, amaute hong thokik teitei ding uh a, hih khuapi hong halsak veve ding uh hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” a hong ci hi
Faro' galkapte Jerusalem khua a hong naih ciangun Babylon galkapte a nungkik uh hi
Tua laitakin kei zong Jerusalem khua panin ka behte kiangah ka gamhluah teng a la dingin Benjamin gamah a pai dingin ka dingkhia hi
Benjamin Kongpi ka tun' ciangin Shelemiah' tapa, Hananiah' tupa Irijah a kici kongcingpa in kei kiangah, “Nang Babylon mite' lamah a taisim ding na hi hi,” ci-in a hong man hi
Tua ciangin kei zong, “Hilo hi'ng; Babylon mite' lamah ka taisim kei ding hi,” ka ci hi. Ahih hangin Irijah in ka thugen hong ngailoin kei hong man a, kumpi uliante kiangah hong paipih hi
Kumpi uliante zong kei tungah heh mahmah uh a, hong sat khit uh ciangin thong dingin a kizangsa, kumpi thuvanpipa Jonathan' inn-ah thong hong kiasak uh hi.
Leisung thongmial-ah ni tampi ka om khit ciangin

kumpi Zedekiah in kei hong samsak hi. Kumpipa in a innsungah, “ Topa' hong thugen kam khat beek omlo ahi hiam?” ci-in a hong dongsim hi. Kei zong, “Om mah hi,” ka cih khit ciangin, “Babylon kumpipa' khutsungah nang hong kipia taktak ding hi,” ci-in ka gen hi
Tua ciangin kei zong kumpi Zedekiah' kiangah, “Kei thong nong kiatsakna dingin nang' tungah ahi a, na nasemte tung leh hih mite' tungah ahi zongin bang khialhna hong bawl ka hi hiam
Nang' kiangah, ‘Babylon kumpipa in nang leh hih gam hong simlo ding hi,’ ci-in thu a hong genkhol, na kamsangte tu-in koi-ah om ahi uh hiam

Tu-in ka to kumpipa aw, ka thugen nong ngaihna dingin kong thum hi. Kumpi thuvanpipa Jonathan' inn-ah nong puak kik nawnlohna dingin na mai nuai-ah kiniamkhiatna tawh kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nong puakkik leh tua lai-ah ka si taktak ding hi,” ka ci hi

Tua ahih manin kumpipa Zedekiah in kumpi thonginn sungah ka kiat zawkna ding thu pia a, khuasunga anlum a bei matengin anlum sai panin nisimin anlum khat ta hong piasak den hi. Tua ahih manin kumpipa' thong sungah a om ka suak hi.
